languages.text: Pull an ally to a nearby cell. If ally is bigger than you, get pulled instead.

traits.locale_text: Pull an ally to a nearby cell. If ally is bigger than you, get pulled instead.

languages.text: The user pulls an ally within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells to themselves. If that ally is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that ally instead.
languages.original_text: Pull an ally to a nearby cell. If ally is bigger than you, get pulled instead.

traits.locale_text: The user moves an ally within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells to a cell adjacent to themselves. If that ally is larger than the user, the user is moved to a cell adjacent to that ally instead.

The user moves an ally within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells to a cell adjacent to themselves. If that ally is larger than the user, the user is moved to a cell adjacent to that ally instead.
The user pulls an ally within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells to themselves. If that ally is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that ally instead.
The user pulls an ally within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells to themselves. If that ally is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that ally instead.

The user moves an ally within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells to a cell adjacent to themselves. If that ally is larger than the user, the user is moved to a cell adjacent to that ally instead.

languages.text: Обладатель аугмента подтягивает к себе союзника в пределах {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} клеток. Если этот союзник больше обладателя аугмента, то вместо этого он подтягивает обладателя аугмента к себе.
languages.original_text: The user pulls an ally within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells to themselves. If that ally is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that ally instead.

traits.locale_text: Обладатель аугмента подтягивает к себе союзника в пределах {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} клеток. Если этот союзник больше обладателя аугмента, то вместо этого он подтягивает обладателя аугмента к себе.

Обладатель аугмента перемещает союзника в пределах {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} клеток на соседнюю с собой клетку. Если этот союзник больше обладателя аугмента, вместо этого сам обладатель аугмента перемещается на соседнюю с союзником клетку.

Обладатель аугмента подтягивает к себе союзника в пределах {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} клеток. Если этот союзник больше обладателя аугмента, то вместо этого он подтягивает обладателя аугмента к себе.

languages.text: El usuario atrae a un aliado situado en un radio de {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} casillas hacia sí mismo. Si ese aliado es de mayor tamaño que el usuario, en vez de eso será el usuario quien se vea atraído hacia el aliado.
languages.original_text: The user pulls an ally within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells to themselves. If that ally is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that ally instead.

traits.locale_text: El usuario atrae a un aliado situado en un radio de {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} casillas hacia sí mismo. Si ese aliado es de mayor tamaño que el usuario, en vez de eso será el usuario quien se vea atraído hacia el aliado.

languages.text: Der Nutzer zieht einen Verbündeten in einem Radius von {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} Feldern zu sich. Ist der Verbündete größer als der Nutzer, wird Letzterer zu dem Verbündeten gezogen.
languages.original_text: The user pulls an ally within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells to themselves. If that ally is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that ally instead.

traits.locale_text: Der Nutzer zieht einen Verbündeten in einem Radius von {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} Feldern zu sich. Ist der Verbündete größer als der Nutzer, wird Letzterer zu dem Verbündeten gezogen.

languages.text: Kullanıcı, en fazla {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} hücre uzaklıktaki bir dost birimi kendisine doğru çeker. Bu dost birim, kullanıcıdan büyükse onun yerine kullanıcı, dost birime çekilir.
languages.original_text: The user pulls an ally within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells to themselves. If that ally is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that ally instead.

traits.locale_text: Kullanıcı, en fazla {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} hücre uzaklıktaki bir dost birimi kendisine doğru çeker. Bu dost birim, kullanıcıdan büyükse onun yerine kullanıcı, dost birime çekilir.

languages.text: L'utilisateur attire à lui un allié se trouvant dans un rayon de {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cases. Si cet allié est plus grand que lui, les rôles s'inversent et c'est l'utilisateur qui est attiré.
languages.original_text: The user pulls an ally within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells to themselves. If that ally is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that ally instead.

traits.locale_text: L'utilisateur attire à lui un allié se trouvant dans un rayon de {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cases. Si cet allié est plus grand que lui, les rôles s'inversent et c'est l'utilisateur qui est attiré.

languages.text: 使用者将{uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d}格内的一名盟友拉向自身。若该盟友体型大于使用者，则改为将使用者拉向该盟友。
languages.original_text: The user pulls an ally within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells to themselves. If that ally is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that ally instead.

traits.locale_text: 使用者将{uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d}格内的一名盟友拉向自身。若该盟友体型大于使用者，则改为将使用者拉向该盟友。

languages.text: 使用者は{uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d}マス以内の味方を自分の元へ引き寄せる。その味方が使用者より大きい場合は、代わりに使用者がその味方の元へ引き寄せられる。
languages.original_text: The user pulls an ally within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells to themselves. If that ally is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that ally instead.

traits.locale_text: 使用者は{uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d}マス以内の味方を自分の元へ引き寄せる。その味方が使用者より大きい場合は、代わりに使用者がその味方の元へ引き寄せられる。
